attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WSCA.SLS_CR_ASSGN_MANUAL_ADJ_KEY   
,WSCA.ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD            
,WSCA.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG             
,WSCA.SCASA_CREATION_DT             
,WSCA.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
,WSCA.SALES_REP_NUM                 
,WSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,WSCA.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,WSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT          
,WSCA.SS_CD                         
,WSCA.SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT        
,WSCA.CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME      
,WSCA.MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
,WSCA.ROLLUP_FLG                    
,WSCA.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT
,WSCA.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME  
,WSCA.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD
,WSCA.SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD         
,WSCA.SALES_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG  
,WSCA.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD 
,WSCA.PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM 
,WSCA.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WSCA.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WSCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WSCA.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WSCA.START_TV_DTM                  
,WSCA.END_TV_DTM                    
,WSCA.SK_SC_ID_INT                  
,WSCA.LAST_UPDATED_DTM              
,WSCA.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT            
,WSCA.SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG    
,WSCA.LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG       
,WSCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            
,WSCA.TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG        
,WSCA.DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG        
,WSCA.SRC_RPTD_SALES_REP_NUM        
,WSCA.SRC_RPTD_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT    
,WSCA.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM          
,WSCA.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT           
,WSCA.UCRM_CASE_NUM         /* Below Columns added as part of NG */          
,WSCA.TRX_SPLIT_BU_ID               
,WSCA.SK_TRX_SPLIT_ID_INT           
,WSCA.OFFER_ATTRBTN_ID_INT          
,WSCA.SPLIT_1_OFFR_ATTRBTN_PCT      
,WSCA.SPLIT_2_NEW_RENEW_PCT         
,WSCA.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_KEY             
,WSCA.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT               
,WSCA.SALES_MOTION_CD               
FROM 
$$WORKDB.W_SCA_RBK_MNL_ADJ_OLY_RTNR WSCA
WHERE 
WSCA.DML_TYPE= 'I'
AND NOT  EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_RBK_MNL_ADJ_OLY_RTNR_TV NSCA
WHERE WSCA.SLS_CR_ASSGN_MANUAL_ADJ_KEY =  NSCA.SLS_CR_ASSGN_MANUAL_ADJ_KEY)

SELECT
SLS_CR_ASSGN_MANUAL_ADJ_KEY   
,ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD            
,REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG             
,SCASA_CREATION_DT             
,BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
,SALES_REP_NUM                 
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,SALES_COMMISSION_PCT          
,SS_CD                         
,SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT        
,CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME      
,MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
,ROLLUP_FLG                    
,SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT
,SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME  
,SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD
,SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD         
,SALES_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG  
,PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM 
,BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD 
,EDW_CREATE_USER               
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,SK_SC_ID_INT                  
,LAST_UPDATED_DTM              
,DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT            
,SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG    
,LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG       
,SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            
,TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG        
,DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG        
,SRC_RPTD_SALES_REP_NUM        
,SRC_RPTD_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT    
,EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM          
,EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT           
,UCRM_CASE_NUM    /* Below Columns added as part of NG */              
,TRX_SPLIT_BU_ID               
,SK_TRX_SPLIT_ID_INT           
,OFFER_ATTRBTN_ID_INT          
,SPLIT_1_OFFR_ATTRBTN_PCT      
,SPLIT_2_NEW_RENEW_PCT         
,RTR_ATTRIBUTION_KEY             
,TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT               
,SALES_MOTION_CD
FROM	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_RBK_MNL_ADJ_OLY_RTNR_TV   
WHERE	END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
